from odoo import models, fields


class HrJobChecklistTemplate(models.Model):
    _name = 'hr.job.checklist.template'
    _description = 'Job Position Checklist Template'
    _order = 'sequence, id'
    _inherit = ['mail.thread', 'mail.activity.mixin']

    job_id = fields.Many2one(
        'hr.job',
        string='Job Position',
        required=False,
        ondelete='cascade',
        help='Leave empty to create a global default template reusable by any job position',
    )

    name = fields.Char(
        string='Checklist Item',
        required=True,
        tracking=True,
        help='Name of the checklist item (e.g., Job Posting Template, Resume Filter Checklist)'
    )

    sequence = fields.Integer(
        string='Sequence',
        default=10,
        help='Order of this checklist item'
    )

    status = fields.Selection(

content.text:
Fixed! Here's the solution to ensure items are added to the correct notebook:

**Changes made:**

1. **Added a name to the checklist notebook:**
   ```xml
   <notebook name="checklist_notebook" invisible="not job_id">
   ```

2. **Updated the xpath to target the original notebook specifically:**
   ```xml
   <xpath expr="//notebook[not(@name='checklist_notebook')]" position="inside">
   ```

**Why this works:**
- `//notebook[2]` doesn't work in Odoo view inheritance because xpath evaluates against the base view before your changes
- By naming the checklist notebook, we can exclude it explicitly
- The xpath `//notebook[not(@name='checklist_notebook')]` targets any notebook **without** that name, which is the original notebook from the base view

**Result:**
- **First notebook** (checklist_notebook): Recruitment Checklist tab
- **Second notebook** (original): Phone Screen, Quiz, Portal Access tabs

This approach is more reliable than using index numbers and will work correctly regardless of view inheritance order.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <record id="hr_applicant_view_form_tracker" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">hr.applicant.form.tracker</field>
        <field name="model">hr.applicant</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="hr_recruitment.hr_applicant_view_form"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <!-- Hide Details tab -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='application_details']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="invisible">1</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- Add Tracker tab at the beginning -->
            <xpath expr="//notebook[2]/page[1]" position="before">
                <page string="Tracker" name="tracker">

                    <!-- Basic Info Section -->
                    <group string="Basic Information">
                        <group>
                            <field name="indeed_zip_source"/>
                            <field name="ranking"/>
                            <field name="job_post_salary"/>
                        </group>
                        <group>
                            <field name="current_salary"/>
                            <field name="desired_salary"/>
                            <field name="negotiable"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <!-- Kanban Schedule Interview: see recruitment_interview_manager (hr_applicant_kanban.xml) -->

    <!-- Reorganize main form fields layout -->
    <record id="hr_applicant_view_form_layout" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">hr.applicant.form.layout</field>
        <field name="model">hr.applicant</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="hr_recruitment.hr_applicant_view_form"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <!-- Hide LinkedIn profile -->
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='linkedin_profile']" position="attributes">
                <attribute name="invisible">1</attribute>
            </xpath>

            <!-- Add desired salary after phone -->
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='partner_phone']" position="after">
                <field name="desired_salary" string="Desired Salary"/>
                <field name="indeed_zip_source" string="Platform"/>
                <field name="migration_status" string="Employment Authorization"/>
            </xpath>

            <!-- Add job post salary after job_id -->
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='job_id']" position="after">
                <field name="job_post_salary" string="Salary Range (Posted)"/>
